name: Capirotada (Bread Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the sliced bread and break into 2-inch pieces.
2. Make a syrup of water, sugar, spices, and salt. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Butter an oblong baking pan.
4. Layer bread, cheese, raisins, and butter in the pan.
5. Pour syrup over the bread mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until the syrup is absorbed.
7. Serve warm or cold. If served warm, top with whipped cream.
